texto: Some say compared to Bononcini That Mynheer Handel's but a ninny Others aver that he to Handel Is scarcely fit to hold a candle: Strange all this difference should be 'Twixt Tweedle-dum and Tweedle-dee!
explicacao: Orientação direta de John Byrom sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Some say compared to Bononcini That Mynheer Handel's but a ninny Others aver that he to Handel Is…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, comparison, handel, útil em momentos de reflexao.
